title: MIF Source Envelope (inbound boundary)
description: A raw ingested source normalized into a MIF v1.0 memory unit at the ingestion boundary (SPEC §10, inbound conformance). The base $ref points at the REAL vendored MIF schema (schemas/mif/mif.schema.json); this file only adds, never overrides. Harness-local requirements: a provenance block carrying a sourceType (W3C-PROV, the non-negotiable inbound invariant mirrored from import-corpus.sh), and extensions.harness.source carrying the fetch metadata (url, fetchedAt, contentType). Validated with the same ajv MIF closure as findings.

sourceType.description: How the source entered: agent_inferred for a live WebFetch/WebSearch, external_import for a corpus import.

source.description: Fetch-boundary metadata for the raw source this envelope wraps.

url.description: Canonical URL (or file URI) the source was fetched from.

contentType.description: MIME type of the fetched source (text/html, application/pdf, text/plain, ...).
